text:
Thursday, 08 Aug 2024

PARIS, Aug. 7 (Xinhua) -- World No. 1 Poland beat the United States in five sets here on Wednesday to set up the men's volleyball final against hosts France at the Paris 2024.

Wilfredo Leon Venero scored 26 points to lift Poland over the Americans 25-23, 25-27, 14-25, 25-23, 15-13 in the semifinals.

The United States beat off three match points in a row to pull within 14-13 in the tiebreak, only to find Venero convert on the fourth with a smash.

"No tension. No tension at all. If we don't do it on the first, we'll do it on the second and if we don't do it on the second, we'll do it another time," said Venero when asked about his mentality towards the end of the match.

Later on Wednesday, defending champions France swept Italy 3-0 (25-20, 25-21, 25-21) in the other semifinal match.

The gold medal match is slated for Saturday.

Thank you for your report!
